subcodes.first_line: The verses of God, the All-Powerful, the Mighty, the All-Wise, have been sent down unto the Leaf who, when she heard the Call from the direction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آیات الله المقتدر العزیز الحکیم نزلت للورقه التی اذا سمعت الندا من شطر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action
